prompt: Identify the safety hazards, their severity, and the immediate controls required.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is X-104 Hot work within 2.12 Safety & Rigging. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The observed field condition is: combustibles within radius uncovered. The work is being assessed at the in-progress lifecycle state with source anchors NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J.
title: T2 X-104 Hazard spotting
